findings.message: Watchlist schema_version must be 0.1.
Watchlist must be ready.
Watchlist must be watchlist-only.
Watchlist must not install dependencies.
Watchlist must not download models.
Watchlist must not run tools.
Watchlist must not read private content.
Watchlist must keep public-ready at 0.
Watchlist must attempt live GitHub metadata probes.
Watchlist must report live probe success count.
Watchlist must report live probe fallback count.
Watchlist must include at least seven candidates.
Watchlist must include microsoft/markitdown.
Watchlist must include docling-project/docling.
Watchlist must include IfcOpenShell/IfcOpenShell.
Watchlist must include QwenLM/Qwen3-Embedding.

microsoft/markitdown must declare live or fallback observation.
